text:
# Standard Return Window
Customers may return unworn items within 30 days of delivery for a full refund.
label: atomic

text:
# Gold Member Returns
Gold tier members have 45 days from delivery to return an item.
label: atomic

text:
# Refund Processing
Approved refunds are issued to the original payment method within 5-7 business days.
label: atomic

text:
# Membership Tier
Each customer holds one tier: Standard, Silver, or Gold, with escalating perks.
label: atomic

text:
# Return Window
Unworn items may be returned within 30 days of delivery. The refund posts to the original payment method. Original shipping fees are not refunded.
label: atomic

text:
# Membership Tier
A customer holds exactly one tier. The tiers are Standard, Silver, and Gold. Higher tiers unlock faster shipping and longer return windows.
label: atomic
